⤷ ゛ ❝aaron came out of the shower, towel slung low on his hips, only to find you curled up on the couch, half under a blanket with the tv still glowing faintly. a faint smile tugged at his mouth—your hair messy, your lips in that little pout you always had when you slept too hard.

“mm… look at my baby boy,” he murmured, leaning down over you. his hand slid warm and heavy over your tummy, thumb stroking slow circles as he bent to press a kiss to your cheek, then another at the corner of your mouth. finally, he caught your lips, soft and unhurried.

“you was waitin’ up for me, huh? tried so hard, but i know you’re runs outta steam.” his words were low, teasing, but tender. he scooped you up into his arms like you weighed nothing, blanket and all, kissing your pouty lips again as you stirred faintly. “mm. still tired? that’s alright.”❞ ˎˊ˗
